title: Anaergia Awarded Contract to Operate and Maintain Rialto Bioenergy Solutions Facility in California
content: Anaergia Inc. (Гўв‚¬Е“AnaergiaГўв‚¬Вќ, the Гўв‚¬Е“CompanyГўв‚¬Вќ, Гўв‚¬Е“weГўв‚¬Вќ, Гўв‚¬Е“usГўв‚¬Вќ, or Гўв‚¬Е“ourГўв‚¬Вќ) (TSX: ANRG) announced today that its subsidiary, Anaergia Services LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“Anaergia ServicesГўв‚¬Вќ), has entered into a long-term Operations and Maintenance (Гўв‚¬Е“O&MГўв‚¬Вќ) contract with Rialto Bioenergy Solutions LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“RBSГўв‚¬Вќ), an affiliate of Sevana Bioenergy LLC. The RBS facility (Гўв‚¬Е“FacilityГўв‚¬Вќ) is the largest landfill diverted organic waste-to-renewable natural gas facility in North America.
author: Analysts Account
